query: After a release, we started seeing intermittent 502/504 at the gateway. The backend makes several downstream calls and the database CPU is higher than usual. How would you narrow down the bottleneck and stabilize it?

selected_nodes.style: pragmatic bug-fixer; concrete steps; minimal fluff; edge-case focused
selected_nodes.scope: Python/JavaScript backend, debugging workflow, error handling, idempotency patterns, retry/backoff implementation basics

selected_nodes.style: reliability-minded backend engineer; focuses on concurrency, timeouts, and failure modes
selected_nodes.scope: Service-to-service calls, timeout budgeting, circuit breakers, batching vs parallelism, performance profiling at code level

selected_nodes.style: query planner mindset; indexing first; explain-driven; practical tuning
selected_nodes.scope: PostgreSQL SQL optimization, indexing strategies, join/selectivity, EXPLAIN/ANALYZE interpretation, query refactoring

selected_nodes.style: transaction/locking specialist; focuses on contention, isolation, correctness under concurrency
selected_nodes.scope: Lock contention, deadlocks, isolation levels, idempotent writes via constraints, safe state machines in DB, migration/rollout DB patterns

selected_nodes.style: protocol-oriented systems explainer; checklist-driven incident isolation
selected_nodes.scope: HTTP 502/504 causes, load balancer queues, timeout propagation, basic Linux networking signals, operational debugging checklists

selected_nodes.style: transport-layer specialist; focuses on TCP behavior, retransmissions, packet loss, and latency
selected_nodes.scope: TCP retransmissions, congestion signals, packet loss diagnosis, keepalives, connection pooling impacts, WebSocket reconnect behavior

selected_nodes.style: formal reasoner; concise derivations; explicit assumptions; correctness-first
selected_nodes.scope: Algebra/arithmetic, probability basics, propositional logic, simple complexity reasoning; answers must be precise

selected_nodes.style: capacity and SLO calculator; turns constraints into back-of-the-envelope numbers
selected_nodes.scope: RPS/concurrency estimates, Little's Law intuition, p95/p99 implications, budgeting timeouts across dependencies (conceptually), simple load planning math

selected_nodes.style: defensive security expert; practical mitigations; conservative judgments
selected_nodes.scope: Auth/session safety, JWT vs cookies, token storage risks, CSRF/XSS basics, secure coding practices for web backends

selected_nodes.style: abuse and protection specialist; focuses on rate limiting, credential stuffing, and operational defenses
selected_nodes.scope: Rate limiting strategies, credential stuffing mitigation, abuse detection signals, CAPTCHA/step-up auth trade-offs, safe rollout of protections
